message:
fix(freeze): add getLength method and Symbol subtype handling

- Add getLength method to JSValueWasm32 and JSValueNative for frozen
  code that needs to access array/string length (O(1) via JS_GetLength)
- Add PTR_SUBTYPE_* constants to distinguish Object/Symbol/BigInt/Func
  pointers during compression/decompression
- Fix Symbol decompression to use JS_TAG_SYMBOL instead of JS_TAG_OBJECT

The getLength fix resolves zod build failures where generated frozen
code calls JSValue.getLength but the method was missing.

The Symbol subtype fix ensures Symbols captured in closures are
correctly restored with the proper JS tag when decompressed.
